title: A Resolution approving and adopting the Municipal Development Council (MDC) Resolution No. 2025-06, dated August 15, 2025 entitled "Resolution Reprogramming some portions of the 20% Municipal Development Fund CY 2025 Current Appropriations amounting to Eleven Million five Hundred Thousand Pesos (Php 11,500,000.00) for the Construction / Rehabilitation / Improvement of the Batong Malake Public Market, Phase 1, Brgy. Batong Malake , Los Baños, Laguna and approving the same."
